rationale: C24 was a feature cycle, so C25 starts with mandatory bug hunt. Found 6 bugs (1 CRITICAL, 3 HIGH, 1 MEDIUM, 1 LOW): PARTIR button bypassed BiomeRadial (hardcoded Broceliande), BiomeRadial close/open race condition, BIOME_DATA := type violation, lambda capture-by-reference bugs in CRTLayer and BiomeRadial, unsafe Dictionary cast. Also discovered faction dashboard claimed by C24 never existed in codebase. All bugs fixed. Feature: SeasonalAtmosphere autoload — persistent particle overlay using existing seasonal_particles.gdshader, connected to GameTimeManager for season-based particles (petals/shimmer/leaves/snow) and period-aware density modulation. CRTLayer extended with set_season_modulation() for seasonal fog_color/fog_blend/saturation_boost. Creator feedback addressed: 'L'ambiance doit changer en fonction de saison et heure de journee'.
next_cycle_plan: Implement faction dashboard for HubAntre (was ghost code in C22-C24 — never actually written). CRT-styled PanelContainer with 5 faction ProgressBars, signal-driven via reputation_changed. Bug hunt C25: verify seasonal particles render correctly across all scenes (Hub, Cards, 3D walk), verify set_season_modulation transitions smoothly between seasons, verify no visual conflict between seasonal overlay and BrocSeason's per-scene overlay.
